skills.name: Simony
skills.description: Create a scroll out of one of your skills, allowing others to use it. You can only craft scrolls of maximum-level skills.
skills.effect_text:
Scrolls disappear after use
Craftable scrolls
* Cure
* Monstrance, Turn Undead
* Restoration, Barrier
* Arcane Energy

skills.name: Indulgentia
skills.description: Applies the Indulgentia buff to nearby allies. While the buff is active, targets recover HP in regular intervals.
skills.effect_text:
Heal Factor per Second: CaptionRatio2 %
Targeted Allies: CaptionRatio
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Discerning Evil
skills.description: Damages the enemy and forcibly extends the duration of harmful effects applied by the party member. Damage of Discerning Evil increases in proportion to the number of debuffs the enemy is under and the duration of the debuff that has already been increased does not increase again.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Increases debuff duration by CaptionRatio % of the remaining duration(minimum of 5 seconds)
Increases the damage of Discerning Evil by CaptionRatio2 %(Maximum of 5)

skills.name: Oblation
skills.description: Open an Offering Box to receive donations from allies. Can only be opened near Goddess Statues in fields (not in cities).

skills.name: Spell Shop
skills.description: Open a shop to sell Grace buffs to other characters. Increases price when installing in Dungeon area.
skills.effect_text:
Buffs you can sell:
* Grace: Additional Property Hits
* Grace: Additional Damage
* Grace: Increase Magic Defense
* Grace: Increase Physical Defense
Buff Duration: CaptionRatio minutes

skills.name: Increase Magic Defense
skills.description: Temporarily increases the Magic Defense of you and your party members. The increase applies in proportionally to the caster's SPR.

skills.name: Dekatos
skills.description: Attack an enemy with money collected as offerings.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Indulgentia: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the heal factor of [Indulgentia] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Spell Shop: Duration
attributes.description: * Increases the duration of [Spell Shop] by 3 minutes per attribute level when you apply a registered buff to a target

attributes.name: Dekatos: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dekatos] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Discerning Evil: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Discerning Evil] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Increase Magic Defense: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Increase Magic Defense]'s magic defense increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Grace Additional Holy Hits: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the damage inflicted by additional Holy Hits given by [Grace: Additional Holy Hits] in [Spell Shop] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Grace: Additional Holy Damage
attributes.description:
* Increases the additional Holy Damage given by [Grace: Additional Holy Damage] in [Spell Shop] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Grace: Increase Magic Defense
attributes.description:
* Increases the additional magic defense given by [Grace: Increase Magic Defense] in [Spell Shop] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Grace Increase Physical Defense: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the additional physical defense given by [Grace: Increase Physical Defense] in [Spell Shop] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Physical Stat: Pardoner
attributes.description:
* Pardoner's stat growth ratio is changed.

* INT ↔ STR, SPR ↔ DEX

attributes.name: [Arts] Discerning Evil: Indulgentia
attributes.description: * The debuff duration extension for [Discerning Evil] is limited to a maximum of 20 seconds, and the cooldown of [Indulgentia] is reduced by the largest amount of the debuff extensions.

attributes.name: [Arts] Indulgentia: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Indulgentia] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Discerning Evil: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Discerning Evil] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Dekatos: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Decatose] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Simony: Recovery
attributes.description: * Sinomy skill is changed to combat skill. Removes removable debuffs applied to the nearby allies when used
